---
name: mui-react-views
description: FarmasiLink uses Laravel Inertia with ReactJS for frontend views. Reference Material UI components from llms.txt for building React views.
applyTo: "resources/js/Pages/**/*.tsx"
---

# Material UI for React Views (FarmasiLink)

When building React view components in `resources/js/Pages/`, use Material UI components from `@mui/material` and icons from `@mui/icons-material`.

**Refer to [llms.txt](../../llms.txt) for complete Material UI component documentation, customization guides, and best practices.**

## Quick Reference

- All components and guides are documented in project's `llms.txt` file
